text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... I'm sorry I made you waste your time with
my request.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry I couldn't get it for you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I should really be thinking of ways to be confident
on my own, and I'm sure the plushies would hate
to be separated from their friends...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So in a way, this is better. Yes, this is how things
should be.
